title: I have a bad feeling about this
content:
{{Top|real}}
{{Youmay|the phrase|the [[I Have a Bad Feeling About This!|article]] in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''}}
{{Community}}
{{Citation}}
{{Quote|You've got a bad feeling about this, yes, Luke? You rebels are always saying that. It's almost like a motto. When the first rebel fired the first shot against the empire, he did so with a cry of {{'}}''I've got a bad feeling about this!''{{'}}|Secret Rebel Alliance funder, to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Annual">[[Star Wars Annual (2015) 4|''Star Wars Annual'' (2015) 4]]</ref>}}
[[File:Got_A_Bad_feeling.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Luke Skywalker has a very bad feeling about approaching a "small moon"]]
'''"I have a bad feeling about this"''' is a well-known phrase in ''[[Star Wars]]'' and has become a [[Wikipedia:running gag|running gag]] throughout the saga, as well as several different [[Lucasfilm]] stories and other works. The phrase is spoken for the first time in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] by [[Luke Skywalker]] when he says he has a "bad feeling" about the small moon (The [[Death Star]], unknown to him) he and his friends in the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' were approaching. The phrase reappeared at least once in each subsequent movie. It is also heavily featured and referenced in other ''Star Wars'' media, such as books, comics and video games, where the locution can vary in its exact wording. When spoken, the A in "bad" is sometimes drawn out, as "I have a '''baad''' feeling about this." The phrase is also occasionally referenced by having a character say "I have a '''good''' feeling about this," or something to that effect.<ref name="SW1">[[Star Wars (2015) 1|''Star Wars'' (2015) 1]]</ref>

[[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']] is the first ''Star Wars'' film to not feature "I have a bad feeling about this" spoken in [[Galactic Basic Standard]]. However, the film's director, [[Rian Johnson]], confirmed that the line is in the film, and that it is spoken by [[BB-8]] during the opening battle sequence.<ref name="The Last Jedi appearance">{{WebCite|url=https://www.huffingtonpost.ca/entry/rian-johnson-last-jedi-star-wars-easter-egg_n_5a343517e4b01d429cc8bd59|text='Last Jedi' Director Explains How He Hid A Classic 'Star Wars' Easter Egg|author=Bill Bradley|date=2017-12-16|work=[[Wikipedia:HuffPost|''The Huffington Post'']]|archivedate=20200710235348}}</ref>

In [[Huttese]], the "bad feeling" is ''Dopo me goola''.<ref name="SW24">[[Star Wars (2015) 24|''Star Wars'' (2015) 24]]</ref>

==Appearances in ''Star Wars''==
NB: The lists concerning ''Star Wars'' media are in chronological order.

===Canon media===
====Films====
*{{Film|I}}
{{Quote|I have a bad feeling about this.|As [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'s first line at the beginning, when he talks to [[Qui-Gon Jinn]] onboard the ''[[Saak'ak]]''|<ref name="Episode 1">{{Film|I}}</ref>}}
*{{Film|II}}
{{Quote|I've got a bad feeling about this.|[[Anakin Skywalker]], on [[Geonosis]] in the [[Petranaki Arena|arena]], in reference to the approaching execution beasts|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
*{{Film|III}}
{{Quote|Oh, I have a bad feeling about this.|Obi-Wan Kenobi talking to Anakin Skywalker as their [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|starfighters]] approach a large, closing [[blast door]] on the ''[[Invisible Hand]]''|<ref name="Episode 3">{{Film|III}}</ref>}}
*''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''
{{Quote|I have a really good feeling about this!|[[Han Solo]], when he takes over piloting the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' out of the [[Akkadese Maelstrom|maelstrom]]|<ref name="Solo: A Star Wars Story">''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref>}}
*''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''
{{Quote|I have a bad feeling about th...|[[K-2SO]], when entering an elevator with [[Jyn Erso]] and [[Cassian Jeron Andor]] on [[Scarif]], before being interrupted by Cassian|<ref name="Rogue One: A Star Wars Story">''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref>}}
*{{Film|IV}}
{{Quote|I have a very bad feeling about this.|[[Luke Skywalker]], when the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' approaches the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|Death Star]]|<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
{{Quote|I got a bad feeling about this.|Han Solo, before the walls of the [[Garbage masher 3263827|trash compactor]] start to close in|<ref name="Episode 4" />}}
*{{Film|V}}
{{Quote|I have a bad feeling about this.|[[Princess]] [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia]], while inside the belly of the [[Exogorth|space]] [[Sy-O|slug]], just before the [[mynock]]s appear|<ref name="Episode 5">{{Film|V}}</ref>}}
*{{Film|VI}}
{{Quote|Artoo, I have a bad feeling about this.|[[C-3PO]], when entering [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Boba Fett's Palace|palace]]|<ref name="Episode 6">{{Film|VI}}</ref>}}
{{Quote|I have a really bad feeling about this.|Han Solo, after the [[Ewok]]s start the preparations to roast him, Luke, and [[Chewbacca]]|<ref name="Episode 6" />}}
*{{Film|VII}}
{{Quote|I got a bad feeling about this.|Han Solo, upon realizing that the [[rathtar]]s have been set loose on [[Baleen-class heavy freighter|his freighter]], the ''[[Eravana]]''|<ref name="Episode 7">{{Film|VII}}</ref>}}
*{{Film|VIII}}
**[[BB-8]] says "I have a bad feeling about this" in [[binary]] during the [[Battle of D'Qar|evacuation of D'Qar]], to which [[Poe Dameron]] replies with "Happy beeps here, buddy, come on."<ref name="The Last Jedi appearance" /> This is also why Leia tells Poe, "Just for the record, Commander Dameron, I'm with the droid on this one."
*{{Film|IX}}
{{Quote|I got a bad feeling about this.|[[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]], when the [[First Order]] [[First Order Army|army]] lands on the planet [[Pasaana]]|<ref name="Episode 9">{{Film|IX}}</ref>}}

====Books====
{{IncompleteList|oou=1}}
*In ''[[The High Republic: Light of the Jedi]]'', [[Kassav Milliko]] is described as having a "very bad feeling" while [[Marchion Ro]] is sending [[Kassav's Tempest]] a message during the [[Battle of Kur]].
*In [[Brotherhood (novel)|''Brotherhood'']], [[Ruug Quarnom]] expresses that she "[has] a bad feeling about this" upon collaborating with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and discovering that they found no conclusive evidence regarding the [[Cadesura disaster]].<ref name="Brotherhood">[[Brotherhood (novel)|''Brotherhood'']]</ref>
*In ''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know]]'', the phrase is given in [[Shyriiwook]] as "''Roooarrgh ur roo'',"<ref name="Absolutely Everything">''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know]]''</ref> while in the young reader's novel ''[[The Mighty Chewbacca in the Forest of Fear!]]'', Chewbacca expresses it as "''Murghhhhh grrbokgh.''"<ref name="Mighty Chewbacca">''[[The Mighty Chewbacca in the Forest of Fear!]]''</ref>
*In ''[[The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure]]'', [[C-3PO]] says "I have a bad feeling about this," while riding a [[happabore]] on [[Devaron]].<ref name="Weapon">''[[The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan]]'', Leia says "I have a good feeling about this" before she jumps to safety whilst climbing.<ref name="Leia of Alderaan">''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan]]''</ref>
*In "[[The Red One]]" (''[[From a Certain Point of View]]''), [[R5-D4]] repeatedly experiences a "bad feeling" after being purchased by [[Owen Lars]].<ref name="The">"[[The Red One]]"</ref>
*In ''[[Lost Stars]]'', [[Thane Kyrell]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this" as TIE fighters approach the hidden [[Corona Squadron]] as they scout the Imperial fleet in the [[Hudalla system]].<ref name="Lost Stars">''[[Lost Stars]]''</ref>
*In [[Aftermath (novel)|''Aftermath'']], [[Mister Bones]] says "I have a bad feeling about this" when [[Uugteen]] chase him, [[Temmin Wexley]], and their group through the [[Catacombs of Akiva|Catacombs]] of [[Akiva]].<ref name="Aftermath">[[Aftermath (novel)|''Aftermath'']]</ref>
*In ''[[Aftermath: Empire's End]]'', [[Norra Wexley]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this," during the [[Battle of Jakku]] as she and Mister Bones make their way to the [[Main Imperial base|Imperial base]] in an attempt to find and capture [[Rae Sloane]].<ref name="Empire's End">''[[Aftermath: Empire's End]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Shadow of the Sith]]'', Lando Calrissian says "Have I mentioned I have a bad feeling about this yet, because I can feel it's starting to come on", during his and Luke's search for [[Kadara Calrissian|his own daughter]] and possible [[Sith]] threat.<ref name="Shadow of the Sith">''[[Shadow of the Sith]]''</ref>
*In "[[Hear Nothing, See Nothing, Say Nothing]]" ([[Canto Bight (novella collection)|''Canto Bight'']]), as [[Lexo Sooger]] and his daughter [[Lula Sooger|Lula]] separate for the night, they are both described to have "had a bad feeling."<ref name="HNSNSN">{{StoryCite|story=Hear Nothing, See Nothing, Say Nothing|book=Canto Bight (novella collection)}}</ref>
* In ''[[Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel]]'', the text notes "[[Hunter]] had a bad feeling about this" as [[Phee Genoa]], [[Tech]], and [[Omega]] enter a palace without any communications open to Hunter and [[Wrecker]].<ref name="Sanctuary">''[[Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel]]''</ref>

====Comics====
{{IncompleteList|oou=1}}
*In "[[Tales from Wild Space: The Big March]] from [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 19|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 19]], [[Q5-7070]] says "I have a negative presentment about this," when a large avian creature is about to eat [[Gender|him]].<ref name="SWA19">[[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 19|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 19]]</ref>
*The cover for [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle 5|''Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' 5]] has [[Jaxxon T. Tumperakki]] saying the phrase to [[Lina Graf]] and [[Thom Hudd]].
*In [[Star Wars (2015) 1|''Star Wars'' (2015) 1]], [[C-3PO]] references the iconic phrase by saying, "I have a '''very good''' feeling about this," regarding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|rebels']] infiltration of the [[Weapons Factory Alpha|Imperial weapons factory]] on [[Cymoon 1]].<ref name="SW1" />
*In [[Star Wars Annual (2015) 4|''Star Wars Annual'' (2015) 4]], [[Luke Skywalker]] says, "I've got a bad--", but the secret [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] funder that he is talking to, says "You've got a bad feeling about this, yes, Luke? You rebels are always saying that. It's almost like a motto. When the first rebel fired the first shot against the empire, he did so with a cry of "''I've got a bad feeling about this!''"<ref name="Annual" />
*In [[Princess Leia 1|''Princess Leia'' 1]], [[R2-D2]] displays a message in [[Aurebesh]] on a [[computer]] screen saying 'I've got a bad feeling about this', as he, [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]] and [[Evaan Verlaine]] set off on a [[mission to rescue the survivors of Alderaan]].<ref name="PL1">[[Princess Leia 1|''Princess Leia'' 1]]</ref>
*In [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 26|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 26]], [[Archeology|Doctor]] [[Chelli Lona Aphra|Aphra]] states "I have a bad feeling about this" after being stranded on [[Milvayne]].<ref name="Aphra 26">[[Doctor Aphra (2016) 26|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 26]]</ref>
*In [[Darth Vader (2020) 47|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 47]], Luke Skywalker says to [[R2-D2]], "Well, maybe '''I've''' got a '''good''' feeling about this."<ref>[[Darth Vader (2020) 47|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 47]]</ref>
*In [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 4|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 4]], [[Finn]] says "I had a bad feeling about this…" when they are captured on the ''[[Supremacy]]''.<ref name="TLJ4">[[The Last Jedi Adaptation 4|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 4]]</ref>
*In [[Jedi Knights 2|''Jedi Knights'' 2]], [[Vetna Mooncrest]] says, "[[Grand Master|Master]] [[Yoda]], I have a bad feeling about--"<ref name="Jedi Knights 2"> [[Jedi Knights 2|''Jedi Knights'' 2]]</ref>
*In [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 2|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 2]], while Luke Skywalker is headed to the [[Quatro Cortagio]] club with Doctor Aphra, [[Luke Skywalker]] reassures her, "We'll be fine. I have a good feeling about this."<ref name="Aphra Chaos Agent 2">[[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 2|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 2]]</ref>
*In [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 3|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 3]], while in the [[Quarter clan's headquarters]] on [[Felucia]], Doctor Aphra says to [[Han Solo]], "I have a bad feeling about that room."<ref name="Aphra Chaos Agent 3">[[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 3|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 3]]</ref>

====Video games====
*In ''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'', the phrase is featured whenever there is a battle.<ref name="Force Collection">''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]'', the phrase is available from the beginning as an emote the player can use in game.<ref name="Battlefront 2015">''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'', [[Cal Kestis]] said he "had a bad feeling I'd see you here" when he encountered the [[Second Sister]] on [[Bogano]].<ref name="Jedi Fallen Order">''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'', it is referenced in the campaign when [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]] is speaking to [[Shriv Suurgav]] regarding an operation on [[Sullust]], commenting, "you've got a bad feeling about this, I'd be worried if you didn't."<ref name="Battlefront II 2017">''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]''</ref>

====Television====
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
**In "[[Shadow of Malevolence|Shadow of ''Malevolence'']]," it is said by a [[B1-series battle droid]] about the ensuing [[Battle of the Kaliida Nebula|battle]].<ref name="Shadow of Malevolence">{{TCW|Shadow of Malevolence|Shadow of ''Malevolence''}}</ref>
**In "[[Rookies (episode)|Rookies]]," [[Clone Commander|Commander]] [[Cody]] says it as [[Gender|he]] and [[Clone Captain|Captain]] [[Rex]] walk towards the [[listening post]] on the [[Rishi Moon]].<ref name="Rookies">{{TCW|Rookies (episode)}}</ref>
**In "[[Downfall of a Droid]]," [[Anakin Skywalker]] says it just before his ship is critically damaged at the [[Battle of Bothawui]].<ref name="Downfall of a Droid">{{TCW|Downfall of a Droid}}</ref>
**In "[[Duel of the Droids]]," Rex says it to Anakin Skywalker as they are surrounded by [[battle droid]]s in [[Skytop Station]]. It is said as "I've got a bad feeling about this, sir."<ref name="Duel of the Droids">{{TCW|Duel of the Droids}}</ref>
**In "[[Bombad Jedi]]," this is [[C-3PO|C-3PO's]] response to [[Jar Jar Binks|Jar Jar's]] plan to rescue [[Padmé Amidala]].<ref name="Bombad Jedi">{{TCW|Bombad Jedi}}</ref>
**In "[[Cloak of Darkness]]," [[Nute Gunray]]'s response to both [[Faro Argyus]] crediting himself of rescuing him and to [[Asajj Ventress]] greeting him after killing the traitorous [[Captain]] to report to [[Count]] [[Dooku]] herself for downplaying her role in the [[Viceroy]]'s rescue.<ref name="Cloak of Darkness">{{TCW|Cloak of Darkness}}</ref>
**In "[[Lair of Grievous]]" (Director's Cut Version), [[Nahdar Vebb]] says it right before the floor gives way beneath him, [[Kit Fisto]], and a few [[clone trooper]]s.<ref name="Lair of Grievous">{{TCW|Lair of Grievous}}</ref>
**In "[[Blue Shadow Virus (episode)|Blue Shadow Virus]]," C-3PO says "I'm getting a bad feeling about this" after a droid's head starts to get sawed open.<ref name="Blue Shadow Virus">{{TCW|Blue Shadow Virus (episode)}}</ref>
**In "[[Mystery of a Thousand Moons]]," Obi-Wan Kenobi says it upon entering the [[Reeksa]] cave.<ref name="Mystery of a Thousand Moons">{{TCW|Mystery of a Thousand Moons}}</ref>
**In "[[Legacy of Terror]]," Anakin Skywalker says it upon entering an underground room filled with zombies.<ref name="Legacy of Terror">{{TCW|Legacy of Terror}}</ref>
**In "[[Brain Invaders]]," [[Ahsoka Tano]] says the line to Kit Fisto.<ref name="Brain Invaders">{{TCW|Brain Invaders}}</ref>
**In "[[The Zillo Beast]]," [[Mace Windu]] says the line as the [[Zillo Beast]] wakes up.<ref name="The Zillo Beast">{{TCW|The Zillo Beast}}</ref>
**In "[[The Zillo Beast Strikes Back]]," [[Supreme Chancellor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]] says the line as he is trapped in his [[H-2 executive shuttle|Executive ship]], which is in the grips of an angry Zillo Beast.<ref name="TZBSB">{{TCW|The Zillo Beast Strikes Back}}</ref>
**In "[[The Academy]]," [[Lagos]] says it as the cadets are about to enter a government warehouse.<ref name="The Academy">{{TCW|The Academy}}</ref>
**In "[[Mercy Mission (episode)|Mercy Mission]]," C-3PO says it just before he accidentally falls into the underworld of [[Aleen]].<ref name="Mercy Mission">{{TCW|Mercy Mission (episode)}}</ref>
**In "[[Point of No Return (The Clone Wars)|Point of No Return]]," [[WAC-47]] says it as [[D-Squad]] approaches the ''[[Renown]]''.<ref name="Point of No Return">{{TCW|Point of No Return (The Clone Wars)}}</ref>
*''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''
**In "[[Call to Action]]," [[C1-10P|Chopper]] says "I have a bad feeling about this" during the [[raid on the communications tower]], with [[Sabine Wren]] adding "yeah, you and me both."<ref name="By the Numbers">{{SWKidsYouTube|PUHOGyBGP0I|Every 'Bad Feeling' in Star Wars | Star Wars By the Numbers}}</ref>
**In "[[The Lost Commanders]]," Chopper says "I have a bad feeling about this" as the [[Spectres]] prepare to depart to seek out a potential ally recommended by Ahsoka Tano.<ref name="By the Numbers" />
**In "[[The Call]]," [[Ezra Bridger]] says "I have a ''good'' feeling about this" regarding the [[purrgil]].<ref name="The Call">{{Rebels|The Call}}</ref>
**In "[[Warhead (episode)|Warhead]]," Chopper says "I have a bad feeling about this" after [[Garazeb Orrelios]] decides to bring an [[EXD-9|E-XD-series infiltrator droid]] back to [[Chopper Base]] thinking it is a [[protocol droid]].<ref name="Warhead">{{Rebels|Warhead (episode)}}</ref>
*''[[Star Wars Resistance]]''
**In "[[Breakout]]," [[Kazuda Xiono]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this" as the [[First Order]] arrives on [[Varkana]].<ref name="Breakout">{{Resistance|Breakout}}</ref>
*''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]''
**In "[[Creature Comforts]]," [[Lys Solay]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this" as she hears the roar of an adult [[mardorsh]] while on safari on [[Aludia]].<ref name="Creature Comforts">{{YJA|Creature Comforts}}</ref>
**In "[[Best Friends]]," [[Kai Brightstar]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this" when [[Nubs]] convinces him to follow him through an unknown part of the [[Tenoo tree forest]].<ref name="Best Friends">{{YJA|Best Friends}}</ref>
**In "[[The Battle of Tenoo]]," Lys Solay says "I've got a bad feeling about this" as a group of [[pirate]]s led by the [[Ganguls]] arrive on [[Tenoo]] to [[Battle of Tenoo|invade]] the [[Tenoo Jedi Temple]].<ref name="The Battle of Tenoo">{{YJA|The Battle of Tenoo}}</ref>
*''[[Star Wars: The Acolyte]]''
**In "[[Revenge / Justice]]," [[Yord Fandar]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this" as he stakes out the [[The Stranger|apothecary]] on [[Olega]].<ref name="Acolyte E2">{{Acolyte|Revenge / Justice}}</ref>
*''[[Star Wars: Ahsoka|Ahsoka]]''
** In "[[Part Four: Fallen Jedi]]," after the ''[[Eye of Sion]]'' jumps into [[hyperspace]], [[Jacen Syndulla]] tells his [[Parent|mother]] [[Hera Syndulla|Hera]], "I've got a bad feeling."<ref name="Part Four: Fallen Jedi">{{Ahsoka|Part Four: Fallen Jedi}}</ref>
*''[[Star Wars: Skeleton Crew]]''
**In "[[We're Gonna Be In So Much Trouble]]", [[Nooma|Neel's mother]] says "I have a bad--" while they are secretly installing their communication device, before getting interrupted by the [[safety droid]]s.<ref name="So Much Trouble">{{SkeletonCrew|We're Gonna Be In So Much Trouble}}</ref>

===Legends media===
====Books====
*In ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'', [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] says "I've got a bad feeling about this" after seeing the results of the fight between [[Anoon Bondara]] and [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and questioning the locals about it.<ref name="Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter">''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]''</ref>
*In ''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]'', Obi-Wan Kenobi experiences a bad feeling when he senses the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] swirling about him behind [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]. Much later in the book, when he foresees the possibility of being in a violent situation after he and [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] jump into [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], Kenobi informs Bail of his misgivings and when Bail responds with skepticism, Kenobi says that he is sure that he has a "bad feeling." Shortly before arriving at their destination, Organa asks Kenobi if he still has that "bad feeling" and Kenobi replies in the affirmative.<ref name="The Clone Wars: Wild Space">''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]''</ref>
*In [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], [[Nick Rostu]] interprets one of [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] lines as "I have a bad feeling about this." Later in the novel, Nick thinks "I have a good feeling about this," partially changing the words but thoroughly changing the meaning. Mace also mentions it in his [[The Private Journals of Mace Windu|private journal]], saying, "I don't need any hints from the Force to have a bad feeling about this."<ref name="Shatterpoint">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>
*In ''[[The Hive]]'', it is said by [[Jesson Di Blinth]].<ref name="The Hive">''[[The Hive]]''</ref>
*In the [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]], [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] has a "sudden, unexpected, overpowering, and entirely distressing ''bad feeling'' about this" when Obi-Wan and Anakin begin to overpower him onboard [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']], Anakin says the line just before Obi-Wan goes to fight General Grievous, and [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] says it after he orders [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antillies]] to get the [[Tantive IV/Legends|Tantive IV]] ready, before he goes to investigate the [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|burning of the Jedi Temple]].<ref name="ROTS novelization">[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Revenge of the Sith'']] novelization</ref>
*In ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'', [[Olee Starstone]] has a bad feeling about a "creepy stairway."<ref name="Dark Lord">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]'', [[Den Dhur]] asks [[Laranth Tarak]] if "it would do any good now to say that I've got a bad feeling about this" while they are their on way to visit a [[Cephalon]]. Laranth tells Den to "Consider it indigestion, and deal with it."<ref name="Street of Shadows">''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]''</ref>
*In ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'', [[Astri Oddo]] says about [[Niro 11]]: "I don't like this place. There's a bad feeling here."<ref name="Master of Deception">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'', the narrative states that [[Durga Besadii Tai]] "had a bad feeling about this.…"<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>
*In [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']], [[Kornell Divini]] recalls that [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] Den Dhur often said "I've got a bad feeling about this."<ref name="Death Star">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>
*In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'', [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] says "I have a bad feeling about this" after [[Dusque Mistflier|Dusque]] and [[Finn Darktrin|Finn]] receive their briefing from [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]].<ref name="The Ruins of Dantooine">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref>
*In ''[[A Bad Feeling: The Tale of EV-9D9]]'', the title itself partially quotes the phrase.
*In ''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'', [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] says "I have a very bad feeling about this, Artoo" when he notices a group of stormtroopers searching for their escape craft. After the stormtroopers find it and destroy it, C-3PO's bad feeling gets worse.<ref name="The Glove of Darth Vader">''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''</ref>
*In ''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'', [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] says "I have a bad feeling about this" when he spots a [[septapus]].<ref name="Mission from Mount Yoda">''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''</ref>
*In ''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]'', [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], before his final confrontation with Han Solo, paraphrases the line as "I'm getting ''a bad feeling.''"<ref name="A Hunter's Fate">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>
*In the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] novelization, Lando says that he hates to be the one to say this line as they attempt the unsuccessful rescue of Han Solo from [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Later, after Lando rescues Luke from a band of bounty hunters, Lando promptly cuts Luke off as he attempts to utter the line.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']]</ref>
*In ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'', [[Tyria Sarkin Tainer|Tyria Sarkin]] said the line to her fellow [[Wraith Squadron|Wraiths]] during their [[Mission to Saffalore]].<ref name="Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>
*In ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', Leia says "I've got a bad feeling about this" when seeing [[Zsinj]]'s [[Satellite/Legends|satellites]] in [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir's]] sky.<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>

*In ''Before the Storm'', Han states "I've got a bad feeling about this" when he sees [[Nil Spaar]] giving a speech on the [[Viewscreen/Legends|holomonitor]].<ref name="Before the Storm" />

*''[[New Jedi Order]]''
**In [[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime|''Vector Prime'']], Han says "I've got a—" upon seeing the panicked denizens of [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]], only to be interrupted by his son, Anakin, who smugly completes the phrase. **In [[The New Jedi Order: Traitor|''Traitor'']], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] says the line twice while investigating the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]-infused ruins of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].<ref name="Traitor">''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]''</ref>

===Other media===
*In [[Wikipedia:Doctor Who|''Doctor Who'']] audio drama "Sword of Orion" from [[Wikipedia:Big Finish Productions|Big Finish]], Ike says "I'm getting a bad feeling about this trip" to Grash in reference to their mission to scrap an apparently deactivated spacecraft which is later revealed to carry a horde of Cybermen. Writer [[Wikipedia:Nicholas Briggs|Nick Briggs]] was influenced by ''Star Wars'' when writing the story, so the insertion of the famous line is deliberate. Also in the story, the word "droid" is used, the Cybermen's ship is on numerous occasions referred to as a "stardestroyer," and the main local hub of society and commerce is called Garazone, a deliberate phonic corruption of Coruscant, although in its characteristics Garazone is more like Mos Eisley.
*In ''Timon and Pumbaa's Virtual Safari'' on the Special Edition Release of ''The Lion King'', on the boat tour, Pumbaa want the kid audience to pick left on the second decision, but Timon asks why, and Pumbaa replies "I've got a good feeling about it."
